astralenchant.configuration.base_cost.to: At level n, the consumed experience levels are calculated as: (Current Experience Levels) * (Cost Rate) / √n + (Base Cost) / n
astralenchant.configuration.cost_rate.to: At level n, the consumed experience levels are calculated as: (Current Experience Levels) * (Cost Rate) / √n + (Base Cost) / n
astralenchant.configuration.enchantment_: Note: You must restart the world to apply the changes!
astralenchant.configuration.ignore_bypas: If disabled, Last Stand will not activate against damage with the BYPASSES_INVULNERABILITY tag (such as /kill or the void).
enchantment.astralenchant.almighty.desc: Makes the tool suitable for all blocks. Enables mining of indestructible blocks.
enchantment.astralenchant.essence_of_enc: Increases all item stats based on the total level of all enchantments other than this one.
Collects even normally unobtainable blocks as an item. Preserves block entity data, and while sneaking, preserves block states as well.
enchantment.astralenchant.last_stand.des: Consumes experience points to avoid death.
Negates various damage reductions, and makes attacks deal their full damage.
enchantment.astralenchant.overload.desc: Increases the level of existing enchantments.
enchantment.astralenchant.reactive_armor: Negates effects that bypass armor and enchantments for certain types of damage.
